entry.title: Re: SAP Data Services 4.2 SP12 compatibility with Informa...
entry.content:
Greetings

SAP Information Steward and SAP Data Services MUST be in the same support pack for them to be compatible.

We also recommend that their patches be the same and if not, be as close to each other as possible.

So to answer your question Support Pack 12 is not compatible with Support Pack 14.

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: SSCUI 102139 to define DME user ID is unavailable.
entry.content:
Hello Fabio, yes there is some change in the node that you are trying to access. For details please refer to the What's New document for the release of S/4HANA CE 2408.

https://help.sap.com/doc/ce01d82756b947a1a043a5d5a3204226/2408.00/en-US/WN_CE2408_EN.pdf

Thank you!

Might help.

Thanks

entry.title: The number of thread at Os level is always grater than teh value reportetd in monThread table
entry.content:
Hi there

  • As many of you i'm tring to define the right number of thread for our ASE plaing with "network polling mode","number of disk task", "number of network task" e thread pool but at the end at os level i get a different value than expected.

In our develop environment I try to configure an ASE with the few number of thread as possible.

  • OS: RedHat 8.10 x86_64, HW TYPE: VMware7,1, MEMORY (MB): 80015, CPU #: 8
  • ASE "16.0 SP04 PL05" with
  • kernel mode = threaded
  • network polling mode = inline
  • number of network task = 1
  • number of disk task = 1
  • syb_blocking_pool = 1
  • syb_default_pool = 1
  • syb_system_pool = 2 as a result of number of task config

The result of "select * from monThread" is only 4 rows as aspected

but the linux top -H -p<dataserer pid> reports 10 threads

the dataserver pid + 4 pid as monThread reports + 5 extra thread

Could you explain me the meaning of those extra 5 thread?

Thanks in advance 

Andrea

entry.title: Re: Download an internal table into excel file with extension '.xls'.
entry.content: Have a look at the different types in IF_SALV_BS_XML for the XML_FLAVOUR parameter (your no.2 option)

entry.title: Re: How To Upload Data to a Public or Private Planning Version Using a File Upload Custom Widget Wi
entry.content:
Hello @steven03 ,

As mentioned in my most recent update, this is the final version of the widget that will be released and should only be used to assist with migration to the permanent solution.  Please follow https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/new-end-user-file-upload-in-sap-analytics-cloud-qrc3-2024/ba-p/13780915 for guidance on the new feature.

Best regards,

Amanda

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Data Analyzer
entry.content:
Hi,
Can we modify the Builder Panel of the Data Analyzer, as if I want only selected Measures/Dimensions when i open Data Analyzer through URL Parameter.

entry.title: Re: How to use Content-ID to reference the ETag in an ODa...
entry.content:
If-match * is your friend…

see also the GW Client test case V4_TEST: “$batch - Change Set with Content ID Ref and Patch”

 

--change_set_1
Content-Type: application/http
Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary
Content-ID: 100

POST PrincipalEntities HTTP/1.1
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "PrincipalIdentifier" : "",
  "PrincipalDescription" : "Principal Entity",
}



--change_set_1
Content-Type: application/http
Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary
Content-ID: 200

PATCH $100 HTTP/1.1
Content-Type: application/json
prefer: return=representation
if-match: "*"

{
  "PrincipalDescription" : "Principal Entity Updated"
}

--change_set_1--

entry.title: Re: E_ACTAI_2403-SAP Certified Specialist – Project Manager
entry.content:
Hi @johanC 
It lloks like this is a new question.
I would like to encourage you post this as a new question in our Q&A section

This makes it easier  to follow-up:
That way other learners can benefit from the answer:
If you ask the question there other learners  can search for it in the future if they run into the same issue and there we have more features available for responses.
Would you mind to repost it ?

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: VAT Report Previews
entry.content:
Hi,

We are currently implementing SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition in 4 countries in the EU (Czechia, Slovakia, Poland and Hungary). We have purchased the license for Document and Report Compliance cloud edition (8008260), but up to now have not activated the license for Document and Reporting Compliance for S/4HANA (8013658).

5XU (Document and Reporting Compliance) has always been a scope item in the project, already listed in the DDA. But now, at the end of the Explore phase, it seems like 5XU specifically requires the license for DRC for S/4HANA (8013658) if we want to activate it. Ultimately it all boils down to the need for VAT Report previews, which is essential for us. Without the additional license, it seems like we cannot preview VAT reports.

My main question is if there is any way for VAT Reports to be previewed without requiring the DRC for S/4HANA (8013658) license, or scope item 5XU?

Also, where can I find accurate information about what DRC licenses are required for 5XU?

Thanks a lot

entry.content: I will try updating the agent version to the one I have on my local machine, thanks for your suggestion

entry.title: RAP-Create option: Can all fields including key can be shown in one form ?
entry.content:
Hi All,

In RAP managed scenario, Create option will show the key fields first to enter the input and then show other fields to create. Is there any way we can show all fields in one form?

Thanks,

Liya

entry.title: Re: Using SAP Datasphere Consumption APIs in SAP Build - A 3-legged Authorization Flow Setup
entry.content:
Hi @lochner_louw,

I agree with you that "Client Credentials" is a better and simpler approach for making Service to Service integrations. SAP has already acknowledged that this is a needed feature on the SAP Datasphere Influence portal and this is being worked on.

As the documentation states, "Client Credentials" is not supported for interacting with SAP Datasphere Consumption APIs, at least until now. There is some scenarios for interaction with SAC which the "Client Credentials" flow could be used. But unfortunately this is not the case for the OData Consumption APIs.

Best Regards
Gustavo Kath

entry.title: SAP Returnship Program in India
entry.content:
SAP’s Returnship Program

SAP’s Returnship program offers a full-time, paid job opportunity in India for junior to mid-career professionals with over 3 years of work experience who have taken a career break of 1+ years for maternity or caregiving responsibilities. The program includes workshops, coaching, and a dedicated buddy to ease your transition back into the workforce. SAP Returnship roles are carefully selected to help building skills and confidence as one restart their career.

Program Highlights:

  • Exclusive Roles: Open positions are allocated exclusively for the Returnship program.
  • Hybrid Work Model: The program offers a hybrid work model with 3 days of office presence in Bangalore and Gurgaon, across a range of roles in Development, Services, and Consulting (Technical & Technofunctional).
  • Structured Support: The program is designed to support you during your transition back to the workforce.

What to Expect:

  • Seamless Onboarding: A structured and supportive onboarding experience tailored specifically to ease your transition back to work.
  • Skill Development: You’ll have a dedicated mentor and team supporting you every step of the way.
  • Manageable Workload: Engage in learning opportunities to develop your skills through our extensive learning portfolio.
  • Networking: Expand your professional network and gain access to a community of current and past Returners.

Check out more details and opportunities available here:

https://jobs.sap.com/go/Returnship/9268401/?locale=en_US&utm_source=GetSocialSprinklr&utm_campaign=SAPReturnshipIndiaCareers&source=social-Hiring_Campaigns%2FRecruitment-General_Hiring-Video-Awareness-APJ-N%2FA-jobs.sap.com&campaigncode=CRM-YA23-SMS-1941773&sprinklrid=13964629005

entry.title: Re: Warning message while converting planned order to purchase requsition

entry.title: On server restart, Add-On not working
entry.content:
On server restart, Add-On not working

Service "B1ServerToolsAuthentication" shown Running

After restarting this service, Add-On issue resolves.

Why this so ?

entry.title: Unraveling the Mystery of Missing Employees: A Maiden Journey Through SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
In a recent project, I faced a challenging task that tested my skills and patience as a new SAP SuccessFactors Compensation analyst. With 81,701 employees in the system, only 14,538 met the eligibility criteria—status as Active, Employment Type as Permanent, and Hire Date before February 1, 2024. However, our template only displayed 13,045 eligible employees, leaving 1,493 unaccounted for. Here’s a detailed account of how I went about solving this puzzle.

The Investigation Begins

1. First Clues: The Missing 1,493

To pinpoint why these 1,493 employees were missing, I began by systematically breaking down the problem:

  • 1045 Employees without a Second Manager: The first red flag was that a significant portion of the missing employees didn’t have a second manager (Planner) assigned. This could be a key factor in their absence from the template.

  • 45 Inactive Employees: Further investigation revealed that 45 employees were incorrectly marked as inactive due to an error made by a senior colleague. This was a manageable issue.

  • 57 Employees with Past Assignments: Another 57 employees had past assignments that were completed after June 10. Their past assignments were marked as inactive, which led the system to treat them as inactive employees erroneously.

2. The Remaining Mystery

After addressing these initial issues, I was still left with 366 employees unaccounted for. This required a more in-depth analysis:

  • VLOOKUP Investigation: I employed Excel’s VLOOKUP function to merge and cross-reference various fields, but this approach didn’t yield the missing link.

3. The Breakthrough

Just when I was starting to feel stuck, I decided to narrow down the search by examining the manager assignments of the missing employees. It turned out that all 366 missing employees had the same manager. Intrigued, I used VLOOKUP to trace this manager’s details and discovered that this manager's PS ID was missing from the system because the manager was inactive.

Lessons Learned and Tips for New Analysts

As a newcomer to SAP SuccessFactors, here are some valuable insights and tips I’ve gathered from this experience:

  1. Thorough Initial Analysis: Always start with a comprehensive breakdown of the issue. Identify common patterns or missing links early on.

  2. Utilize All Available Tools: Leverage all available tools and functions, such as VLOOKUP in Excel, to cross-reference and validate data.

  3. Check Manager Assignments: Sometimes, issues might stem from problems with managerial assignments. Ensure that all managers are active and correctly assigned to their teams.

  4. Systematic Approach: Adopt a systematic approach to problem-solving. Document your findings and the steps you take, which can help in troubleshooting and refining your process.

  5. Ask for Help: Don’t hesitate to seek guidance from more experienced colleagues when faced with challenging problems.

By following these steps, I was able to resolve the issue and ensure that all eligible employees were correctly displayed in the template. As a trainee analyst, this experience not only improved my problem-solving skills but also deepened my understanding of SAP SuccessFactors Compensation.

Feel free to share your own experiences or tips for tackling similar challenges in the comments below!

entry.title: Re: Software in This Forum Needs To Be Easier to Use Without Producing Bogus Responses

It offers features for streamlining various processes and keeping track of important details in a more structured way. While it may not solve the specific problems with the forum's editing tools, it could provide a better way to handle and manage content and communications overall.

entry.title: Re: Deep Internal table
entry.content: awesome!

entry.title: Re: How is SAP software used?
entry.content: Imagine SAP as the central hub of a busy airport. Just like an airport controls flights, baggage, and staff to ensure smooth travel, SAP manages different parts of a business like sales, finance, and HR. It helps each area work together seamlessly, so everything runs on time. Just as an airport's control tower directs planes and monitors all activity, SAP keeps track of all business processes and data, making sure everything operates efficiently and stays organized. If you have further doubts don't hesitate to ping me.

entry.title: New primary key definition is invalid due to duplicate entries
entry.content:
Hello SAP.

I am new to datasphere and trying to figure it out.

I am trying to set up an intelligent lookup as illustrated from this link: Data Marketplace and Intelligent Lookup – Part 1 (sap.com) at around 11 min. 25. sec.

I am unable to insert SalesByCityView due to entity not having any primary keys. In the link provided, it does not seem that the instructor have used priamry keys in sales_by_city at around 3 min. 54 sec.

Then, when i am trying to change set a new key in e.g. JABS_test_addresses looks like this:

 

with the following error: new primary key definition is invalid due to duplicate entries. Tried removing all primary keys and then i am able to deploy the views or tables just fine. Though when I am trying to set a new primary key, the same error comes.

Could you please assist in, thoroughly pinpoint where the duplicate entry happens? And how can I fix it? Is it due to circular referencing between dependent objects?

Kind regards, 

Jannik

SAP Datasphere

entry.title: Hi there, Fiori app is not loading in Quality server but loading in Development
entry.content:
Hello,  I am working on a ui5 application. I have successfully tested app through VS code. When I moved application to SAPGUI through "/UI5/UI5_REPOSITORY_LOAD" program, It got uploaded without any errors.

I configured Tile, Catalog, Group everything in Launchpad. Cross checked SICF for service activation & oData Service also. Everything is fine and app loaded smoothly in Development Launch Pad. I can se80 repository name also in launch pad.

But in Quality server App is not loading, I repeated all pre-checks in quality also whatever have done in development but the app is not loading, what I noticed is in sources tab name of se80 repository of fiori app itself is missing. what might have gone wrong I am not understanding.

entry.title: Re: Download an internal table into excel file with extension '.xls'.
entry.content: The ".xls format" means that the data is encoded in the old format used by Excel before 2007 (see https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Microsoft_Excel#File_formats). If they use Excel 2007 or a more recent version, there's no issue to use the .xlsx format. Just convince them. Also, I am sure that you are convinced that abap2xlsx is a good solution, no danger and so on, so just convince them too.

entry.title: SAP Activate for Agile Implementation Cert or SAP Activate Project Manager cert
entry.content: Hi all, I'm in the midst of deciding to go for either the SAP Certified Specialist - SAP Activate Agile Implementation or the SAP Certified Associate - SAP Activate Project Manager. The Organisation that I'm with implementing SAP mainly prefers to go agile with their projects, however I do see that the materials in the Certified SAP Associate PM course do touch on agile methodology as well. Would it be beneficial for me to go for both exams? TIA

  2. Maintain Number Ranges for Payment Orders: App ID : FPN7
  3. Manage Payment orders:   App ID : F7651

entry.title: Re: how to remove additional fields from Adapt filters?
entry.content:
@Consumption.filter.hidden: true

add this to the field.

entry.title: Re: Is SAP and Sustainability a Myth ?
entry.content:
I still believe you can grow and be sustainable, we miss only the technology to do it. Right now big tech companies are increasing emissions because of the big computing of AI, but we miss only the technology that permits to fuel AI without impacting the ecosystem.
It's only a matter of research and improvement.
I suggest the book "Factfulness: Ten Reasons We're Wrong About the World--and Why Things Are Better Than You Think" 📖
It will bring you more positivity thinking about the world and the future.

entry.title: Re: Download an internal table into excel file with exten...
entry.content:
XLS is (was) a Microsoft proprietary format, nowadays most tools use XLSX that is actually some packed file with some XML in it, among other items.

  • If you really require an actual XLS file, use OLE to execute Excel and can force the save format (usually with SAP GUI and Excel installed on your station)
  • Removing the warning message must be performed on Excel installatons
  • Your customers don't understand what they're saying, but it's not a sales argument... 😋

entry.title: How to use MAN_CALL to send other document than MSDS
entry.content:
Hello there,

We want to use Man-Call function to ship a document which is not an SDS document (in fact it is Certified Product Data Sheet for Canada), but when doing this we are having (of course) same email content as for SDS when it is sent to customers as we are using same report category (MSDS) and same business process (MSDS_DIST).

Is there a simple way to send this document through CVD1 / Man-Call with a different email content than for MSDS(s)? Does this need Abap development?
Thanks a lot for your help

Daman

entry.title: Re: Error:Ship Notice line number reference is not allowe...
entry.content:
Hi Prakriti,

This is rather a question for support. Nevertherless, I had someone have a quick look and it is an issue related to the buyer setup. So I would advise you/the impacted supplier to connect to their buyer integration specialist. A Service Request can then be submitted if necessary.

I hope this is helpful,

Benjamin

entry.title: Enter end date. [Service Contracts - End Date] SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

When creating a delivery note then I am facing error like Enter end date. [Service Contracts - End Date]

I have checked into Service Contract and mentioned END date which is the last date of Financial year but remain same issue.

Item is managed by the series number and serial number Expiration Date and Mfr Warranty End is less then above last date of Financial year but issue remain same.

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Hi there, Fiori app is not loading in Quality server but loading in Development
entry.content:
Hello,  I am working on a ui5 application. I have successfully tested app through VS code. When I moved application to SAPGUI through "/UI5/UI5_REPOSITORY_LOAD" program, It got uploaded without any errors.

I configured Tile, Catalog, Group everything in Launchpad. Cross checked SICF for service activation & oData Service also. Everything is fine and app loaded smoothly in Development Launch Pad. I can se80 repository name also in launch pad.

But in Quality server App is not loading, I repeated all pre-checks in quality also whatever have done in development but the app is not loading, what I noticed is in sources tab name of se80 repository of fiori app itself is missing. what might have gone wrong I am not understanding.

Errors:

Error Response: 

2024-08-21 16:55:52.137000 The issue is most likely caused by application sap.dfa.help.utils.adapters.fiori. Please create a support incident and assign it to the support component of the respective application. - Failed to load UI5 component with properties: '{
"url": "/resources/sap/dfa/help/utils/adapters/fiori",
"self": {
"name": "sap.dfa.help.utils.adapters.fiori"
},
"enabled": true,
"loaded": true,
"name": "sap.dfa.help.utils.adapters.fiori",
"asyncHints": {
"preloadBundles": [
"sap/ushell_abap/bootstrap/evo/core-ext-light-0.js",
"sap/ushell_abap/bootstrap/evo/core-ext-light-1.js",
"sap/ushell_abap/bootstrap/evo/core-ext-light-2.js",
"sap/ushell_abap/bootstrap/evo/core-ext-light-3.js"
],
"waitFor": []
},
"componentData": {
"startupParameters": {},
"config": {
"product": "SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE",
"version": "2021.latest",
"buttonLocation": "head",
"noHelpMode": "carousel",
"useGlobalHelp": "true",
"showShortDescription": "false",
"dataUrlUACP": "https://help.sap.com/webassistant",
"learningAppBackendUrl": "https://education.hana.ondemand.com/education/",
"learningAppWorkspace": "s4",
"LACommunityUrl": "https://community.sap.com/"
},
"oPostMessageInterface": {}
},
"manifest": false
}'. Error likely caused by:ModuleError: failed to load 'sap/dfa/help/utils/adapters/fiori/Component.js' from /resources/sap/dfa/help/utils/adapters/fiori/Component.js: 404

entry.title: Re: Where can I find free material to study SAP SuccessFa...
entry.content:
To learn SAP SuccessFactors Compensation, you can follow a structured approach to maximize your understanding and practical knowledge. Here’s a step-by-step guide to help you get started:

  1. Implementation Guide: Begin by reviewing the comprehensive SAP SuccessFactors Compensation Implementation Guide. This document is quite detailed, spanning approximately 450 pages, and offers in-depth insights into the implementation process. You can access it directly through this link: SAP SuccessFactors Compensation Implementation Guide. Make sure to read through the various sections to grasp the intricacies of compensation management within SuccessFactors.

  2. Overview Blog: For a more digestible introduction, check out this overview blog that provides a summary of SAP SuccessFactors Compensation. It's a great starting point to get familiar with the key concepts and benefits of the system: Introduction & Overview - Part 1.

  3. Implementation Essentials: To understand the core requirements and steps involved in implementing SuccessFactors Compensation, refer to this detailed blog post on implementation essentials. It outlines the necessary preparation and requirement-gathering processes: Implementation Requirement Gathering Steps.

  4. Supplementary Learning: If you find yourself needing a break from reading or prefer a different learning format, consider watching videos related to SAP SuccessFactors Compensation. ZaranTech offers valuable video content on compensation implementation that might provide additional insights and practical examples.

  5. Also explore SAP Learning there are amazing free courses on compensation.

By following these resources, you’ll build a solid foundation in SAP SuccessFactors Compensation and be well-prepared for implementation and administration tasks.

entry.title: Re: Hi there, Fiori app is not loading in Quality server...
entry.content:
It does not matter if you don't see the folder of the app. That folder appear only when you click on the tile and it's loaded the first time. 

I don't understand if you have an error when you click on the tile of the app or you cannot see the app at all. 
Because from the second screen you have an error but we don't understand where is from. Can you share the console log also

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: Yes, the warning comes up as there is a potential for the data to be altered like example if it has translations. To avoid this, you can filter out by specifying the language and add '1' to document the change cardinality. Check this link for more information: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/acquire-core-abap-skills/using-associations-in-path-expressions_daff758b-a544-4613-9a6e-aa1a2df73a33

entry.title: Re: Tooltip for button in fiori element annotation
entry.content: fellow explorer Did i find the sloution for this

entry.title: Re: XML tags as list in Content Modifier
entry.content: Instead of using a content modifier, you can use an XSLT mapping to transform the XML structure and extract all '<value>' elements.

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:
Hi,

The above screenshot is from another participant. Kindly send the screenshot of your CDS view.

entry.title: Re: Hi there, Fiori app is not loading in Quality server...
entry.content: Hi, the console log is like these I got: Error Response: 2024-08-21 16:55:52.137000 The issue is most likely caused by application sap.dfa.help.utils.adapters.fiori. Please create a support incident and assign it to the support component of the respective application. - Failed to load UI5 component with properties: '{ "url": "/resources/sap/dfa/help/utils/adapters/fiori", "self": { "name": "sap.dfa.help.utils.adapters.fiori" }, "enabled": true, "loaded": true, "name": "sap.dfa.help.utils.adapters.fiori", "asyncHints": { "preloadBundles": [ "sap/ushell_abap/bootstrap/evo/core-ext-light-0.js", "sap/ushell_abap/bootstrap/evo/core-ext-light-1.js", "sap/ushell_abap/bootstrap/evo/core-ext-light-2.js", "sap/ushell_abap/bootstrap/evo/core-ext-light-3.js" ], "waitFor": [] }, "componentData": { "startupParameters": {}, "config": { "product": "SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE", "version": "2021.latest", "buttonLocation": "head", "noHelpMode": "carousel", "useGlobalHelp": "true", "showShortDescription": "false", "dataUrlUACP": "https://help.sap.com/webassistant", "learningAppBackendUrl": "https://education.hana.ondemand.com/education/", "learningAppWorkspace": "s4", "LACommunityUrl": "https://community.sap.com/" }, "oPostMessageInterface": {} }, "manifest": false }'. Error likely caused by:ModuleError: failed to load 'sap/dfa/help/utils/adapters/fiori/Component.js' from /resources/sap/dfa/help/utils/adapters/fiori/Component.js: 404

entry.title: Re: HS Code Field Hide in Sap S4 Hana 2021 in Material Master
entry.content: Thanks for the reference!

entry.title: Re: com.businessobjects.sdk.core.server.internal.markup.xml.XmlValidationException:
entry.content: Has anyone found solution this this exception

entry.title: Re: Deploy Typescript-SAPUI5 Application to BTP
entry.content:
Hi,
for the people who face a similar issue. I was able to solve the described one by adding missing tasks to the ui5.yaml, so that the customTasks-section looks like this:

 

customTasks:
  - name: ui5-tooling-modules-task
    afterTask: replaceVersion
    configuration:
      addToNamespace: true
  - name: ui5-tooling-transpile-task
    afterTask: replaceVersion
  - name: ui5-task-zipper
    afterTask: generateCachebusterInfo
    configuration:
      archiveName: <your_projectname>
      additionalFiles:
      - xs-app.json

 

Best regards,
Lukas

entry.title: Re: Integrating Successfactors Recruiting with customer c...
entry.content:
Hi Alfonso,

SAP does not provide any documentation regarding custom integrations as we do not support them. It is that SAP SuccessFactors provides APIv2 (or v4) framework that allows building custom integrations, ref. to OData V2 HXM Reference Guide . There is nothing for scraping websites, at least I am not aware of such SAP tool - you need to search on the market.

Regards, Piotr

entry.title: Re: sdk.core.server.common error
entry.content: How to resolve this and is it due to product defect?

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Just Ask Feature
entry.content: @hector_andres_garcia My client also wants to use Just Ask with live datasphere models. As you mentioned, it true that we cannot index/define synonyms/rules on datasphere models. How you were able to convince your client if his requirement was to use Just Ask with live datasphere models?

entry.title: Re: T CODE SHOWING MATERIAL AN HS CODE
entry.content: If there is no standard TCODE, you could build a quickview via SQVI. The materials (MATNR) + HS codes (CCNGN) are stored in table /SAPSLL/MARITC.

entry.title: Re: New primary key definition is invalid due to duplicate entries
entry.content: Sorted by setting ADDRESSID to primary key and project it onto view just to validate.

entry.title: Re: Hi there, Fiori app is not loading in Quality server...
entry.content: I resolved the issue by activating Se80 repository name in SICF T-Code it worked fine.

entry.title: Re: Hi there, Fiori app is not loading in Quality server...
entry.content: resolved the issue by activating Se80 repository name in SICF T-Code it worked fine.

entry.title: Re: Just Ask with datasphere model
entry.content: Thank you for the reply. I was able to use live datasphere model in Just Ask but my client wants to create index/define synonyms/rules on live datasphere models. All of these features are not support in live models. Also I see nothing is planned for live models in the SAP roadmap. How you were able to convince your client if his requirement was to use Just Ask with live datasphere models?

entry.title: Re: Is SAP and Sustainability a Myth ?
entry.content:
Hello @smarchesini 

Thank you for your comment. I'll make sure to read the book. 

To me sustainability is the ability to operate in the long-term as we operate currently. The fact is that if anything grows 25% a year over a term of 100 years, which is hardly long term in the human civilization perspective, it needs to grow 4.9 billion times. That is a simple math. Therefore it is not sustainable. Is it not factfulness?

entry.title: Re: Hi there, Fiori app is not loading in Quality server...
entry.content: this error msg is probably not related, how about network tab?

entry.title: NIECONN_REFUSED for /STMC/CL_OSMS_GLOBAL_COLLECTORCP
entry.content:
Hello, 

I found a lot of records in dev_icm file:

[Thr 140342875649792] Direct connect to sap***.<hhhhh>z.com:80 failed: NIECONN_REFUSED(-10) {009ff249} {root-id=0050560400991EDC87A92936D80839A5} [icxxconn.c 4271]

[Thr 140342875649792]   SYNC_RFC T37_U8967_M0, 000, SAP_SYSTEM, , time=16:11:01, W22, program=SAPMSSY1, low priority, memory=0, tasks=1, appl info=R=1 T=S S=p***-app_<SID>_00 I=/STMC/CL_OSMS_GLOBAL_COLLECTORCP F=/S, tcode=

Could you please help me to resolve the issue.

 

NIECONN_REFUSED   /STMC/CL_OSMS_GLOBAL_COLLECTORCP

entry.title: Creating A Simple Mobile Attendance Application With Local Storage
entry.content:
Hi folks

I'm new to SAP Build and would like to build a simple mobile attendance application with local storage.

Please see attached photo.

However the photo is only a guideline.

Would like to know how to joint the logics behind the frontend.

Meanwhile any advice from you would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you with regards.

Johnny

entry.title: Traceability_Scrap quantity in In process Inspection & Production order operation wise confirmation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Could you please advise on the below requirement. 

1. Traceability for Scrap quantity recorded in Quality In-process Inspection

2. Traceability for Scrap quantity recorded in Production order operation wise confirmation

Is there any material document generated for the scrap quantity recorded in the above steps.

Is there any report available for scrap quantity recorded in SAP through the above steps. We are currently using SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

 

Please advise.

Thank you,

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Re: How to filter the execution of MD47 for a specific st...
entry.content:
Hello

I checked in the system and I don't think it's possible to filter by storage location. Even in the profile customizing, there is no reference to the storage location.
Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Re: SAP Activate for Agile Implementation Cert or SAP Act...
entry.content:
Hi Johan,

SAP Certified Associate - SAP Activate Project Manager verifies that you have learned the basics of SAP Activate Methodology and its different phases and the deliverables therein. As you may have already noticed, attaining this certification requires you to go through the course ACT200 (Discovering SAP Activate - Agile Project Delivery) as the topics of agilitiy is being addressed in the ceritification questions.

I would rather advise you to start with this one!

Best Regards, 

Omar

entry.title: Re: Amazon Business - Supplier Reference: SAP Business Network for Procurement
entry.content: Really good asset, with a big name! Happy to see that Amazon Business are not only a competitor, but also a trusted and long-standing supplier on SAP Business Network. 👍

entry.title: Re: SAP.GETDATA function not available
entry.content: were you able to resolve this?

entry.title: Re: SSCUI 102139 to define DME user ID is unavailable.
entry.content:
Dear customer, 

this SSCUI is defined for specific countries only (Italy, France and Spain). Are you using some of these countries?

Could you try to open the app Implementation Activities https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('SIMG')/S33 and try to find the activity there? You can use a search function and search for "DME ID".

Thanks and regards,

Ondrej Zatopek

entry.title: SAP IAG Connection with Service Now and AD
entry.content:
Problem Statement - We have a requirement that Service Now or Active Directory gets integrated with SAP IAG and is able to create Access Requests in IAG automatically. We got a confirmation from our AD Team that this API Integration is not possible. We also raised an OSS with SAP and they confirmed back that Service Now Integration with IAG is possible if Service Now is SCIM compatible.

Understanding - The Service now team needs to use the standard IAG API Scenarios to communicate with IAG. But IAG cannot communicate back to Service Now. We got a confirmation that this is a simplex connection. So how can the Access Request status be again sent to Service Now.

Requirement - Please do let us know if you have done any such kind of connection between IAG, Service Now or AD. How can the IAG Access request closure status be communicated with Service Now ?

entry.title: Re: MD04 dialog box issue
entry.content: Hi Dominik, thanks for your quick answer. Well I'm just double clicking on the first prod. order and then and the second one. As I know, no custom enhancement there.

entry.title: Re: MD04 dialog box issue
entry.content: I'll then ask support to SAP

entry.title: How to Change Destination Handling unit for Picking on RF device?
entry.content:
Outbound delivery for STO or sales order warehouse task will be created automatically, picking will be done using RF devices. During the picking process warehouse clerk some times not able to reach the pallets suggested by system he/she would like to pick the handling unit which is in the front of aisle ( Same bin, same prod) this need to be done through RF using exception code.

How can I change the Destination Handling unit for Picking on RF device?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to Change Destination Handling unit for Picking o...
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

You can use the exception code CHHU to change the destination handling unit (HU) in a warehouse task in the RF system. For further reference, check the documentation Exceptions.

Thank you and best regards,

Geovana

entry.title: Re: SAP RAR Optimized Contract Management: Period End Activities & Reporting
entry.content:
HI Jitakshi,

Thanks for nice Blog! can you also suggest if there are any standard forecasting report or Fiori app for the same? 

Thanks & Regards,

Roshan

I'm writing to apply for certification

entry.title: SAP text enhancements and upgrade
entry.content:
A short question: do SAP text enhancement (i.e. changed descriptions of standard data elements via CMOD) get lost during upgrade?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: MD04 dialog box issue
entry.content:
Hello

Please implement SAP Note 3363583 - Wrong display of detailed info in MD04 / Follow-up correction to 3337854 and test this scenario again. 

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Re: Download an internal table into excel file with extension '.xls'.
entry.content: Hi @abo, Thanks for your reply. I tried with all the possible values of XML_FLAVOUR, but still same issue.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI) || Part 7 || Maintaining logs by using "Groovy Scripts
entry.content:
Hi,

Can you please explain to add logs in same file when we get input data multiple times.

For Example -  User A logs added, then User B logs added below of B and keep updating same log file.

entry.title: CAP: $count=true returning 0 as the amount although the results are not empty
entry.content:
Hello CAP Experts,

I was creating a basic CAP task list application within the SAP Build Code which works out of the box. Now, I wanted to add a service that only returns the user's tasks. While the basic services/entities are returning the correct amount, my custom service is returning the correct entities in the value but the "@odata.count" is 0. 

This is what is being returned for my current user:

  "@odata.context": "$metadata#UserTasks",
  "@odata.count": 0,
  "value": [
    {
      "ID": "a82f72e9-4ef4-4bed-8aae-60995e5effc0",
      "doneDateTime": null,
      "status": "Open",
      "userMail": "xxx@x.com",
      "taskDescription": "Restock shelves"
    },
    {
      "ID": "1fb9b006-11f9-42b7-b6fc-8f6a57076e63",
      "doneDateTime": null,
      "status": "Open",
      "userMail": "xxx@x.com",
      "taskDescription": "Inventory check"
    },
    {
      "ID": "8d84f9d7-6b62-4e55-8ad1-2dc77390afcb",
      "doneDateTime": "2021-07-01T10:00:00Z",
      "status": "Done,
      "userMail": "xxx@x.com",
      "taskDescription": "Staff training"
    }
  ]
}

  As you can see, the "@odata.count" is 0 although there are multiple entries. Here is my service.cds and service.js:

@Path : '/service/taskapp'
service taskappSrv
{
    @odata.draft.enabled
    entity GenericTasks as
        projection on my.GenericTasks;

    entity UserTasks as projection on my.Tasks {
        *,
        genericTask.description as taskDescription
    };

    entity OpenTasks as 
        projection on my.Tasks
        where status = 'Open';

    @CDS.redirection.target : 'Tasks'
    entity Tasks as
        projection on my.Tasks;
}

UserTasks is the service that is being requested. Here is my custom logic:

module.exports = cds.service.impl(async function () {
  const { UserTasks } = this.entities;

  this.on('READ', 'UserTasks', async (req) => {
    const userMail = req.headers["x-username"];

    console.log('Requested userMail', userMail);

    if (!userMail) {
      req.error(400, 'Parameter "userMail" ist erforderlich');
      return;
    }

    const tasks = await SELECT.from(UserTasks)
      .columns('ID', 'doneDateTime', 'status', 'userMail', 'taskDescription')
      .where({ userMail: userMail });

    console.log('Filtered tasks with description:', tasks);

    return tasks;
  });
});

It is returning and logging the tasks correctly, however my only problem is that the "@odata.count" is 0 in the final response and I don't find any way to change it. The URL that is requested:

/service/taskapp/UserTasks?$count=true

Another thread had the same problem but as I was using the newer version, I am already using oData v4. Also, in the documentation I could not find a workaround for this.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere: Using Replication Flows on Finance Fo...
entry.content: I am also facing issue for finance foundation package for SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA cloud in I_SEMTAGGLACCOUNT CDS view. while mapping I_SEMTAGGLACCOUNT with local table in datasphere I am facing below issue (Change target object. The target object cannot be used because it does not have the required technical column __load_package_id. You can rename the target object using a name that does not exist yet. The system then creates a new object that has the same definition as the source object and contains the technical column. Alternatively, you can map the target object to an existing object that has the required technical column (__load_package_id).

entry.title: Re: ePPDS Variable Resource capacity consumption
entry.content: Which Badi do we need to use inorder to consider Variable Resource Consumption? We are trying to Schedule Hanger/Drums which has capacity let's say 1000. Multiple Product can be loaded on the Hanger at one time.

entry.title: Re: SAP Focused Run – Introduction
entry.content: Nice overview. Do you have some pointers on hardware sizing for Focused Run? Yes, I get that we need to book for workshops with SAP and that leads to that information but are there any resources on this topic published publicly?

entry.title: Re: Download an internal table into excel file with extension '.xls'.
entry.content: Hi Sandra, thanks for your response. Yes, i will try to convice them to use either xlsx or csv. But just curious that, is it not possible to create excel file with '.xls' , whatever old format your mentioned.

entry.title: Re: XML tags as list in Content Modifier
entry.content:
Below is the XSLT code to extract '<value>' elements from incoming message

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<xsl:stylesheet version="3.0"
	xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
	<xsl:template match="/">
		<xsl:for-each select="//value">
			<values>
				<xsl:value-of select="."/>
			</values>
		</xsl:for-each>
	</xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

entry.title: Re: SAP Landscape Management Cloud discontinued
entry.content:
Dear @Shaun_Wimpory, 

Please excuse that I missed your comment earlier as my subscription to the post didn't work as expected. I understand your frustration with the decision, but in-line with SAP's product strategy and observing the customer adoption of SAP Landscape Management Cloud in the past years, we are now shifting our product focus away from solutions to manage SAP landscapes in an on-premise setup.

Kind regards,
Marco Dorn
Product Management

entry.title: Re: Launch SAP Business ByDesign Reports using Parameterized URLs
entry.content:
Hi @knutheusermann ,

We tried and it work fine using standard fields.

Unfortunately, when we try to do the same using an extension field, value is not transfered to the field.

 

We try using '/' PAR_SEL_/1AN/75904F8813DE886 and does not work

We try using 's' PAR_SEL_s1ANs75904F8813DE886 and does not work

We try using '%F2' PAR_SEL_%F21AN%F275904F8813DE886 and does not work

We try removing all delimeters / following your guideline for extension fields, and does not work.

We try removing also 'PAR_SEL' and does not work

Could you help us?

BR,

Jordi

entry.title: Re: Unauthorised error while connecting to Built Process...
entry.content:
Hello Priya,

Thank you for reaching out. The 401 Unauthorized error could be due to an incorrect API endpoint. Please refer to the attached screenshot for more details. Please let us know if you are still facing any issues.
